atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for approximately three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient suspects work in the basement contributed to the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty reaching overhead.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain when applying pressure to the affected area.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes two extra strength acetaminophen every six to eight hours.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the medication provides some relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any prior shoulder injuries.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals decreased active and passive abduction.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness over the greater tuberosity of the humerus.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals capillary refill less than three seconds.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes acetaminophen as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a six to eight week course of physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in four weeks.
